# Submodels generated by subsets of models of signatures

```agda
module universal-algebra.submodels-generated-by-subsets-models-of-signatures where
```

<details><summary>Imports</summary>

```agda
open import elementary-number-theory.natural-numbers

open import foundation.dependent-pair-types
open import foundation.functoriality-propositional-truncation
open import foundation.propositional-truncations
open import foundation.propositions
open import foundation.subtypes
open import foundation.unit-type
open import foundation.universe-levels

open import lists.functoriality-tuples
open import lists.subtypes-tuples
open import lists.tuples

open import universal-algebra.large-poset-submodels-of-signatures
open import universal-algebra.models-of-signatures
open import universal-algebra.signatures
open import universal-algebra.submodels-of-signatures
```

</details>

## Idea

Given a [subset](foundation.subtypes.md) `S` of a
[model](universal-algebra.models-of-signatures.md) `M` of a
[signature](universal-algebra.signatures.md), there is a least
[submodel](universal-algebra.submodels-of-signatures.md) of `M` which contains
`S`.

## Definition

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 : Level}
  (σ : signature l1)
  (M : Model-Of-Signature l2 σ)
  (S : subset-Model-of-Signature l3 σ M)
  where

  data
    path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature :
      type-Model-Of-Signature σ M → UU (l1 ⊔ l2 ⊔ l3)
    where

    root-path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature :
      (x : type-Model-Of-Signature σ M) →
      is-in-subtype S x →
      path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature x

    op-path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature :
      (op : operation-signature σ) →
      (xs :
        tuple (type-Model-Of-Signature σ M) (arity-operation-signature σ op)) →
      all-tuple path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature xs →
      path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature
        ( is-model-set-Model-Of-Signature σ M op xs)

  subset-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature :
    subset-Model-of-Signature (l1 ⊔ l2 ⊔ l3) σ M
  subset-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature x =
    trunc-Prop (path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature x)

  leq-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature :
    S ⊆ subset-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature
  leq-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature x x∈S =
    unit-trunc-Prop (root-path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature x x∈S)

  abstract
    is-closed-under-operations-subset-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature :
      is-closed-under-operations-subset-Model-of-Signature
        ( σ)
        ( M)
        ( subset-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature)
    is-closed-under-operations-subset-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature
      op xs xs⊆FS =
      map-trunc-Prop
        ( op-path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature op xs)
        ( choice-all-trunc-prop-tuple xs xs⊆FS)

  submodel-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature :
    Submodel-Of-Signature (l1 ⊔ l2 ⊔ l3) σ M
  submodel-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature =
    ( subset-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature ,
      is-closed-under-operations-subset-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature)

  model-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature :
    Model-Of-Signature (l1 ⊔ l2 ⊔ l3) σ
  model-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature =
    model-Submodel-Of-Signature σ M submodel-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature
```

## Properties

### The model generated by `S ⊆ M` is the least submodule of `M` containing `S`

```agda
module _
  {l1 l2 l3 l4 : Level}
  (σ : signature l1)
  (M : Model-Of-Signature l2 σ)
  (S : subset-Model-of-Signature l3 σ M)
  (T : Submodel-Of-Signature l4 σ M)
  (S⊆T : S ⊆ subset-Submodel-Of-Signature σ M T)
  where

  abstract
    {-# TERMINATING #-}
    -- we eliminate a constructor at every step; why doesn't Agda accept it?
    is-in-submodel-leq-generators-Submodel-Of-Signature :
      (x : type-Model-Of-Signature σ M) →
      path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature σ M S x →
      is-in-Submodel-Of-Signature σ M T x

    all-is-in-submodel-tuple-leq-generators-Submodel-Of-Signature :
      {n : ℕ} (xs : tuple (type-Model-Of-Signature σ M) n) →
      all-tuple (path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature σ M S) xs →
      all-tuple (is-in-Submodel-Of-Signature σ M T) xs

    is-in-submodel-leq-generators-Submodel-Of-Signature
      x
      (root-path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature .x x∈S) =
      S⊆T x x∈S
    is-in-submodel-leq-generators-Submodel-Of-Signature _
      ( op-path-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature op xs paths-xs) =
      is-closed-under-operations-subset-Submodel-Of-Signature
        ( σ)
        ( M)
        ( T)
        ( op)
        ( xs)
        ( all-is-in-submodel-tuple-leq-generators-Submodel-Of-Signature
          ( xs)
          ( paths-xs))

    all-is-in-submodel-tuple-leq-generators-Submodel-Of-Signature
      empty-tuple _ =
      raise-star
    all-is-in-submodel-tuple-leq-generators-Submodel-Of-Signature
      (x ∷ xs) (x-path , xs-paths) =
      ( is-in-submodel-leq-generators-Submodel-Of-Signature x x-path ,
        all-is-in-submodel-tuple-leq-generators-Submodel-Of-Signature
          ( xs)
          ( xs-paths))

    is-lower-bound-submodel-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature :
      leq-Submodel-Of-Signature σ M
        ( submodel-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature σ M S)
        ( T)
    is-lower-bound-submodel-generated-subset-Model-Of-Signature x =
      rec-trunc-Prop
        ( subset-Submodel-Of-Signature σ M T x)
        ( is-in-submodel-leq-generators-Submodel-Of-Signature x)
```
